pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17 from 8.78.6 to 8.79.1
pull_request.body:
[//]: # (dependabot-start) ⚠️ **Dependabot is rebasing this PR** ⚠️ Rebasing might not happen immediately, so don't worry if this takes some time. Note: if you make any changes to this PR yourself, they will take precedence over the rebase. --- [//]: # (dependabot-end) Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.78.6 to 8.79.1.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17's releases.

v8.79.1

What's Changed

  • C#: Improve csproj manipulation and add reattestation by @​macsux in openrewrite/rewrite#7316
  • XmlParser: case-insensitive accept for nuget.config by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#7317
  • C#: Remove REWRITE_SOURCE_PATH env var from RPC launcher by @​macsux in openrewrite/rewrite#7322
  • Treat all packages listed in requirements.txt as direct dependencies by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7320
  • Parse all requirements files in requirements-only Python projects by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7323

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.79.0...v8.79.1

8.79.0

What's Changed

  • Go: Fix how generics (parametrized types) are parsed by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7294
  • Fix DTD ENTITY parsing when quoted values contain angle brackets by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7280
  • Scala: ExpressionStatements by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7296
  • C#: Fix RPC serialization of XmlDoc comments by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7297
  • Fix NPE in UpgradeDependencyVersion ext property upgrade by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7299
  • Scala: fix parsing of pattern matching with case conditions by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7298
  • Go: fix parsing of multi-parameter generics by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7300
  • Add UsePropertyAssignmentSyntax recipe for Gradle (#5828) by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7286
  • Scala: parsing to support multiline case blocks with no {} braces by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7301
  • Support META-INF/services files in ChangePackage and ChangeType by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7282
  • Preserve whitespace in DTD internal subset markup declarations by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7302
  • Fix Groovy as-style type casts losing space around as keyword by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7303
  • Python: fix for not crashing with empty files by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7304
  • Scala: fix whitespace parsing of type casts by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7306
  • Fix MavenDependency#findNewerVersion ExactVersion edge cases by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7305
  • Fix IndexOutOfBoundsException in JavaTemplateParser.parseExpression by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7295
  • Fix Docker line continuation with CRLF line endings by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#7309
  • Fix UpdateMavenModel using stale projectPoms for child module resolution by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7310
  • Fix MergeYaml Document.End fallback inserting extra blank lines by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7311
  • Fix URISyntaxException in MavenPomDownloader for unresolved version placeholders by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7313
  • Add PythonDependencyFile trait for polymorphic dependency management by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7274

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.78.6...v8.79.0

Commits
  • 6e9b467 Parse all requirements files in requirements-only Python projects (#7323)
  • 80b3c86 Treat all packages listed in requirements.txt as direct dependencies (#7320)
  • 4929215 Remove REWRITE_SOURCE_PATH env var support from C# RPC launcher (#7322)
  • 5559bfc XmlParser: case-insensitive accept for nuget.config (#7317)
  • 71809c7 C#: Improve csproj manipulation and add reattestation (#7316)
  • 7767c5f Add PythonDependencyFile trait for polymorphic dependency management (#7274)
  • 83bd388 Fix URISyntaxException in MavenPomDownloader for unresolved version placehold...
  • b0f88bc Fix MergeYaml Document.End fallback inserting extra blank lines (#7311)
  • 5a79346 Fix UpdateMavenModel using stale projectPoms for child module resolution (#73...
  • fcbae1c Fix Docker line continuation with CRLF line endings (#7309)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
